description_long: This object is a large, square-shaped parcel box wrapped in a light brown paper with a wide, sky-blue ribbon tied around it, forming a bow on the top. The ribbon runs vertically and horizontally, creating a cross pattern on all visible sides. Attached to one side of the box is a round, metallic-looking medallion or tag, featuring a geometric, hexagonal emblem with a blue border and a white center. The box appears sturdy and is likely made of cardboard, with the ribbon and medallion providing decorative and possibly functional elements. The bow on top is voluminous, with long ribbon tails draping over the edges. The overall appearance suggests it is a gift or a special delivery parcel, suitable for urban environments such as doorsteps, sidewalks, or delivery vehicles.
description: A large, brown parcel box wrapped with a sky-blue ribbon and bow, featuring a metallic medallion with a geometric emblem on one side. The box is decorative and sturdy, suggesting it is a gift or special delivery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown box with a blue ribbon and bow, and the medallion with a geometric emblem clearly visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical blue ribbon and the thickness of the box, with the medallion seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back and side of the box, with the medallion and ribbon visible but the bow partially obscured.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the plain brown surface and the blue ribbon, with the bow and ribbon tails draping over the top edge.
